description: pi-zflow default sentinel policy — allowlist-first mutation safety.

blockedPatterns.reason: Git metadata must not be modified by automation
Gitignore must not be modified without explicit user intent
Gitattributes must not be modified without explicit user intent
Gitmodules must not be modified without explicit user intent
node_modules is managed by package manager
Environment/secret files must not be modified by automation
Private key files must not be modified by automation
Private key files must not be modified by automation
Credential files must not be modified by automation
Secrets directory must not be modified by automation
SSH config must not be modified by automation
AWS config must not be modified by automation
User config must not be modified by automation
Pi config must not be modified without explicit user intent
Build output is generated; modify source instead
Cache directory should not be modified by automation
